name: PV1 Population Validator
description: Layer 4: Cross-substrate population validator. One query produces two validation dimensions simultaneously — (a) GTEx eQTL: Molecular→Cellular sim_real_corr (fast-loop proxy, ms-scale), (b) UKB GWAS: Population-level p-value (slow-loop validation, days-to-months). Enforces OPR-2 per-substrate ρ isolation (UKB_European EMA ≠ ChinaMAP_EAS EMA) and OPR-5 federation gate (ossification_risk must be < 0.6 before cross-node ρ sharing).

capabilities.description: Query GTEx Portal for a gene's expression across 54 tissues. Compare measured expression with AlphaGenome-predicted functional effect. Return observed/predicted ratio per tissue (sim_real_corr) with cross-layer CausalId linking back to AG1 prediction record.

Query UK Biobank 344K longevity GWAS (Nature Comms 2025, DOI: 10.1038/s41467-025-57315-6) summary statistics for variant-level significance. Return p-value, beta, effect direction, and OPR-2 substrate tag (UKB_European). Novel variants without GWAS signal → recorded as 'candidate_discovery'.

Dual ossification risk tracking: (A) ossification_risk_tissue = 0.0026 — 9 substrate groups nearly balanced (H≈max_H), healthy; (B) ossification_risk_population = 0.685 — UKB European dominant, OPR-5 federation gate BLOCKED until ChinaMAP integration reduces < 0.6.

Per-substrate ρ_ema tracking across 9 GTEx pseudo-substrate groups. Brain: 0.788, Cardiovascular: 0.779, Digestive: 0.722, Endocrine: 0.690, Immune: 0.530. Immune lowest (model blind spot). OPR-2 enforced — per-substrate EMA, no mixing.

metadata.pacr:substrate_gap: ChinaMAP 10K WGS not yet integrated (pending institutional approval); CLHLS 22.3K longevity cohort pending; FinnGen 500K pending; cross-ethnic validation incomplete

pacr:governance.principle: P0-1: Causal Knowledge Over Prediction Score. PV1 validates predictions against population data.

metadata.pacr:dual_ossification: C5_distinction: tissue-level (substrate balance) vs population-level (ancestry bias)
